# Experimental data

<!-- This file is generated by generate-experimental.sh. Do not edit manually. -->

Xatu also collects data from short-lived devnets that test upcoming network upgrades. Devnets run xatu from a fork branch, so their schema is ahead of the main catalog: they carry tables for the upgrade being tested that don't exist on production networks yet.

Devnet data lives on the same ClickHouse endpoint as production networks: `https://clickhouse.xatu.ethpandaops.io`.

Each devnet gets its **own database**, named after the network. Unlike production tables in the `default` database, you don't filter on `meta_network_name` — the database *is* the network:

```sql
SELECT * FROM `glamsterdam-devnet-6`.beacon_api_eth_v1_events_block LIMIT 3
```

> Devnets are ephemeral. Databases disappear when a devnet is deprovisioned, and schemas drift between devnets — always check what a devnet actually has before relying on it.

## Active devnets

| Network | Fork | Xatu branch | Fork-specific tables | Source |
|---------|------|-------------|----------------------|--------|
| `bal-devnet-7` | `gloas` | [`release/gloas`](https://github.com/ethpandaops/xatu/tree/release/gloas) | 0 | [ethpandaops/bal-devnets](https://github.com/ethpandaops/bal-devnets) |
| `blob-devnet-0` | `fulu` | [`release/fulu`](https://github.com/ethpandaops/xatu/tree/release/fulu) | 0 | [ethpandaops/blob-devnets](https://github.com/ethpandaops/blob-devnets) |
| `glamsterdam-devnet-6` | `gloas` | [`release/gloas`](https://github.com/ethpandaops/xatu/tree/release/gloas) | 16 | [ethpandaops/glamsterdam-devnets](https://github.com/ethpandaops/glamsterdam-devnets) |

## Fusaka (`fulu`)

Collected by xatu's [`release/fulu`](https://github.com/ethpandaops/xatu/tree/release/fulu) branch on: `blob-devnet-0`

### Tables in the main catalog

These tables were introduced for Fusaka and have since merged to xatu master — they are part of the main catalog and available on production networks:

- [`beacon_api_eth_v1_events_data_column_sidecar`](./beacon_api_.md#beacon_api_eth_v1_events_data_column_sidecar)
- [`libp2p_gossipsub_data_column_sidecar`](./libp2p_.md#libp2p_gossipsub_data_column_sidecar)
- [`libp2p_rpc_data_column_custody_probe`](./libp2p_.md#libp2p_rpc_data_column_custody_probe)

No devnet-only tables — these devnets run the standard xatu schema.

## Glamsterdam (`gloas`)

Collected by xatu's [`release/gloas`](https://github.com/ethpandaops/xatu/tree/release/gloas) branch on: `bal-devnet-7`, `glamsterdam-devnet-6`

### beacon_api_eth_v1_events_execution_payload

Execution payload envelope arrivals from beacon API SSE (execution_payload event, fires on import into fork-choice).

Available on: `glamsterdam-devnet-6`

<details>
<summary>EthPandaOps Clickhouse</summary>

```bash
echo '
    SELECT
        *
    FROM `glamsterdam-devnet-6`.beacon_api_eth_v1_events_execution_payload
    WHERE
        slot_start_date_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
    LIMIT 3
    FORMAT Pretty
' | curl "https://clickhouse.xatu.ethpandaops.io" -u "$CLICKHOUSE_USER:$CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD" --data-binary @-
```
</details>

#### Columns
| Name | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| **updated_date_time** | `DateTime` | *Timestamp when the record was last updated* |
| **event_date_time** | `DateTime64(3)` | *When the sentry received the event from a beacon node* |
| **slot** | `UInt32` | *Slot number from the event payload* |
| **slot_start_date_time** | `DateTime` | *The wall clock time when the slot started* |
| **propagation_slot_start_diff** | `UInt32` | *Difference between event_date_time and slot_start_date_time in ms* |
| **epoch** | `UInt32` | *Epoch number* |
| **epoch_start_date_time** | `DateTime` | *The wall clock time when the epoch started* |
| **block_root** | `FixedString(66)` | *Beacon block root the envelope references* |
| **builder_index** | `UInt64` | *Index of the builder that produced the payload* |
| **block_hash** | `FixedString(66)` | *Execution block hash* |
| **state_root** | `FixedString(66)` | *Execution state root* |
| **slot_number** | `Nullable(UInt64)` | *EIP-7843 SLOTNUM: the execution payload slot_number field (typically equals the beacon slot)* |
| **meta_client_name** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Name of the client that generated the event* |
| **meta_client_id** | `String` | *Unique Session ID of the client* |
| **meta_client_version** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Version of the client* |
| **meta_client_implementation** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Implementation of the client* |
| **meta_client_os** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Operating system of the client* |
| **meta_client_ip** | `Nullable(IPv6)` | *IP address of the client* |
| **meta_client_geo_city** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *City of the client* |
| **meta_client_geo_country** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Country of the client* |
| **meta_client_geo_country_code** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Country code of the client* |
| **meta_client_geo_continent_code** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Continent code of the client* |
| **meta_client_geo_longitude** | `Nullable(Float64)` | *Longitude of the client* |
| **meta_client_geo_latitude** | `Nullable(Float64)` | *Latitude of the client* |
| **meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_number** | `Nullable(UInt32)` | *ASN of the client* |
| **meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_organization** | `Nullable(String)` | *AS organization of the client* |
| **meta_network_id** | `Int32` | *Ethereum network ID* |
| **meta_network_name** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Ethereum network name* |
| **meta_consensus_version** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Consensus client version* |
| **meta_consensus_version_major** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Consensus client major version* |
| **meta_consensus_version_minor** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Consensus client minor version* |
| **meta_consensus_version_patch** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Consensus client patch version* |
| **meta_consensus_implementation** | `LowCardinality(String)` | *Consensus client implementation* |
| **meta_labels** | `Map(String, String)` | *Labels associated with the event* |
